# FixDNS.net

> Freelance DNS troubleshooting by Michal Ferber (TechGuyWithABeard) — one-on-one
> Zoom sessions that fix DMARC, SPF, DKIM, MX/mail routing, the 2024 Google &
> Microsoft bulk-sender rules, and newsletter-platform DNS verification
> (MailerLite, Mailchimp, and the rest). US East Coast, native English. You keep
> control of your registrar and DNS host — no passwords are ever shared. Sessions
> are booked by the hour: $85 standard, $95 recorded, $145 after-hours. Roughly
> 90% of issues are resolved in under an hour.

## Key links

- [Home](https://fixdns.net/): Services, how it works, pricing, and FAQ.
- [Book a session](https://cal.com/techguywithabeard/): Cal.com booking (Stripe payment at booking).
- [Source code](https://github.com/MichalAFerber/fixdns.net): Public repository for this site.
- [MailerLite Certified Expert](https://michalferber.me/2024-01-21-mailerlite-expert/): Credential.

## Notes

- No user accounts, no forms, and no data collected on-site; booking and payment happen on Cal.com + Stripe.
- Analytics is privacy-friendly, self-hosted Plausible — no Google Analytics, no ad tracking.
